title: salix × neisseana
intro: Salix × neisseana, a hybrid willow species, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the black willow (Salix nigra), known for its distinctive characteristics and medicinal properties. The bark of Salix × neisseana contains salicin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it a valuable herb for pain relief and reducing fever. The health benefits of Salix × neisseana include alleviating menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from headaches and arthritis. Salix × neisseana is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, with the dried bark being steeped in hot water to create a soothing and effective remedy.
